LAW AND MOTION, 301, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. ARGUED. THE COURT WILL ALLOW FURTHER BRIEFING ON THE LIMITATION OF LIABILITY LANGUAGE IN THE CONTRACT. DEFENDANT'S SUR-REPLY WILL BE DUE MARCH 23, 2026. PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE TO THE SUR-REPLY WILL BE DUE APRIL 3, 2026, AT WHICH TIME THE MATTER WILL BE TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: ANGELA POURTABIB, CSR 13714 (T: 415.601.7054, E: APOURTABIB@GMAIL.COM)
